prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on acrolein was performed using chemkit with the method set to dft, functional b3lyp, basis def2-tzvp, tier standard, in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The main results indicate the most electrophilic site is atom 4 (C) and the most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (O). Warnings include charge drift suggesting N+1 state convergence issues.
